productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Stripes Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has blue and white stripes, a spread collar with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, concealed buttoned chest placket, appliqued and embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Blue and white stripes lend a preppy feel to this polo neck T-shirt from status quo. The appliqued brand seal with the embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest enhances the brand image. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
